title: Outbound LEARN-link provenance manifest (ADR-051)
description: Per-link attribution + classification record for every outbound URL surfaced in a LEARN tab. Generated by scripts/build-link-provenance.ts; consumed by validate-data, the runtime data layer, the LinkCredit component, and the public /library page (Milestone L-D).

schema_version.description: Bump this in lock-step with breaking changes to the entry shape.

commit_sha.description: Repo HEAD at generation time. May be null in dirty trees.

id.description: Stable hash-derived id `entity_id__hash(url)` so the manifest survives label edits.

entity_id.description: Id of the mission / module / planet / etc. that owns the link.

route.description: App route where the link is rendered (e.g. /missions, /iss, /moon, /mars, /earth, /explore).

url.description: Canonicalised destination — no utm_*, fbclid, AMP suffix, or m. mobile prefix.

label.description: Display label (English baseline; locale overlays may translate it).

tier.description: intro = first-impression links (operator portal, hero overview); core = top-tier reference (mission page, agency PDF); deep = third-tier (academic paper, archival press release).

language.description: BCP-47 code (e.g. en, ru, zh, ja, hi, ar) or '*' for multi-lingual landing pages.

fair_use_rationale.description: Short string. Default: 'External reference; no copyrighted material redistributed; rendered with rel=noopener noreferrer external'.

last_verified.description: ISO date when the link-checker most recently saw a 2xx (or its initial author-recorded date).

replaced_with.description: Successor URL when a link is replaced after a 4xx/5xx — keeps the change auditable.

notes.description: Author notes (paywall variants, redirect quirks, regional restrictions).
